source:
routes:
  - id: small-json
    match:
      kind: exact
      prefix: /api/v1/small
    mutation: full
    cache:
      behavior: store
      ttl_seconds: 120
      field_variant:
        enabled: true
        max_variants_per_route: 4
        admission_threshold: 1
        ttl_max_ms: 10000
        include_fields:
          - id
          - name
          - status
